title: 5. Wang Luo Zhen 1985 Qi Jing Ba Mai Kao Jiao Zhu
text:
[A Compilation o f the Study o f the Eight Extraor­
dinary Vessels]. Shanghai Science Publishing House, Shanghai,

писано Ли Ши Чжэнем и впервые опубликовано в 1578.
